description: A data migration error has left several Flight Plans without an assigned Operator. Your task is to fix these 'orphaned' records in the Aerobridge admin panel (http://localhost:8000/admin/) using username 'admin' and password 'adminpass123'. For all flight plans with callsigns starting with 'MIG-ERR-', identify the assigned Pilot's Company/Organization from the Persons registry and assign it as the Operator for that flight plan. Do not modify any other flight plans.
